summary: Use broad public discussion sources for this round and skip policy or long-tail video sources.

source_decisions.reason: Use broad article discovery for public-claim coverage.
Fast-moving public discussion is relevant for diffusion and recency.
Video discovery is not necessary for this narrow smoke round.
Comment collection is unnecessary without a prior video-collection objective.
Official rulemaking documents are not necessary for this public-discussion-heavy smoke round.
No policy or docket angle is in scope for this round.
Detailed docket comments are unnecessary because no policy source is needed.
